revision.text: {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Graham Harman]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=[[File:Leonhart Arms.svg]]|notable_ideas=[[Evolutionism]]}} I'm bigender and bisexual. My interests are mainly philosophy and theology. I'm a syntheist and an omnist ==Frens== * [[User:Nyuuposting|Nyuuposting]] * [[User:AnAkemie|AnAkemie]] ==Pages I've put major work into== * [[Secular Shrine Theory]] * [[History of Shinto]] * [[Unity of ritual and government]] * [[Proclamation of the Great Religion]] * [[Ministry of Shinto]] and its successor [[Ministry of Religious Education]] * [[Daikyoin]] the Shinto organization founded by the [[Ministry of Religious Education]] to run Shinto priesthood, and [[Shinto Secretariat]] its successor * [[Kyodo Shoku]] the priests trained by the [[Daikyoin]] * [[Sect Shinto]] * [[Shrine Shinto]] *[[Beppo Shrine]] *[[Imperial Court Research Institute]] *[[Sacrifice ritual]] *[[Jongmyo (shrine)]] *{{Ill|Religious Confucianism|lt=Religious Confucianism|zh|儒教}} * {{Ill|Sacrifice to Heaven|zh|祭天}} * {{Ill|Patriarchal system (Western Zhou)|lt=Patriarchal Clan System|zh|宗法}} * {{Ill|Unity of Mankind and Heaven|zh|天人合一}} * {{ill|Shendao|zh|神道设教}} * {{ill|Ritual Music System|zh|礼乐制度}} * {{Ill|Tenno taitei|lt=Greatest Emperor|zh|天皇大帝|ja|天皇大帝}} * {{Ill|Bone divination|zh|卜辞}} * {{ill|Tiangong stove|lt=|zh|天公爐}} * [[Miao shrine]] * {{Ill|Eight surnames of Zhurong|zh|祝融八姓}} * {{ill|All good things come together|zh|萬善同歸}} * {{Ill|Ci Shrine|zh|祠}} * {{Ill|Goryō faith|zh|孤魂信仰}} * {{Ill|Heroic Martyrs Shrine|lt=Heroic Martyrs Shrine|zh|忠烈祠}} * {{ill|Death in vain|lt=died in vain|zh|枉死}} ==Pages I want to make== * {{Ill|equinoctial hours|de|Äquinoktiale Stunde}} * {{Ill|Equal hour|lt=equal hours|de|Äquale Stunden}} * {{Ill|Danna (unit of time)|lt=Danna|de|Danna (Mesopotamien)}} * {{Ill|Ancient Egyptian Day|de|Tag_(Altes_Ägypten)}}

I’m currently working on [[User:Immanuelle/Indo European Drafts]] ==Frens== * [[User:Nyuuposting|Nyuuposting]] * [[User:AnAkemie|AnAkemie]] ==Pages I've put major work into== * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov|Nikolai Fyodorov]] * [[Secular Shrine Theory]] * [[History of Shinto]] * [[Unity of ritual and government]] * [[Proclamation of the Great Religion]] * [[Ministry of Shinto]] and its successor [[Ministry of Religious Education]] * [[Daikyoin]] the Shinto organization founded by the [[Ministry of Religious Education]] to run Shinto priesthood, and [[Shinto Secretariat]] its successor * [[Kyodo Shoku]] the priests trained by the [[Daikyoin]] * [[Sect Shinto]] * [[Shrine Shinto]] *[[Beppo Shrine]] *[[Imperial Court Research Institute]] *[[Jesa]] *[[Jongmyo (shrine)]] *{{Ill|Religious Confucianism|lt=Religious Confucianism|zh|儒教}} * {{Ill|Sacrifice to Heaven|zh|祭天}} * {{Ill|Patriarchal system (Western Zhou)|lt=Patriarchal Clan System|zh|宗法}} * {{Ill|Unity of Mankind and Heaven|zh|天人合一}} * {{ill|Shendao|zh|神道设教}} * {{ill|Ritual Music System|zh|礼乐制度}} * {{Ill|Tenno taitei|lt=Greatest Emperor|zh|天皇大帝|ja|天皇大帝}} * {{Ill|Bone divination|zh|卜辞}} * {{ill|Tiangong stove|lt=|zh|天公爐}} * [[Miao shrine]] * {{ill|All good things come together|zh|萬善同歸}} * {{Ill|Ci Shrine|zh|祠}} * {{Ill|Goryō faith|zh|孤魂信仰}} * {{Ill|Heroic Martyrs Shrine|lt=Heroic Martyrs Shrine|zh|忠烈祠}} * {{ill|Death in vain|lt=died in vain|zh|枉死}} * [[Temporal hour]] * {{Ill|equinoctial hours|de|Äquinoktiale Stunde}} * {{Ill|Equal hour|lt=equal hours|de|Äquale Stunden}} ==My coat of arms== [[File:Leonhart_Arms.svg|thumb]]

{{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Inbe Shrine|Inbe Shrine]] * [[Draft:Watatsumi jinja|Watatsumi jinja]] * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Kanasana Shrine|Kanasana Shrine]] * [[Draft:Shikaumi Shrine|Shikaumi Shrine]] * [[Draft:Toyosaka and Noda Shrines|Toyosaka and Noda Shrines]] * [[Draft:Oarai Isosaki Shrine|Oarai Isosaki Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine|Ōmonoimi-jinja]] might be better called something like Chokaisan Omonoimi Shrine * [[Draft:Chōkai gassan ryōsho-gu|Chōkai gassan ryōsho-gu]] * [[Draft:Gosha-Suwa-jinja|Gosha-Suwa-jinja]] * [[Draft:Oyama Shrine (Mount Tate)|Oyama Shrine (Mount Tate)]] * [[Draft:Furogu Shrine|Furogu Shrine]] * [[Draft:Ōagata jinja|Ōagata jinja]] * [[Draft:Tagata Shrine|Tagata Shrine]] === Deities === * [[Draft:Omonoimi no Kami|Omonoimi no Kami]] * [[Draft:Chislobog|Chislobog]] * [[Draft:Yasakatome|Yasakatome]] * [[Draft:Oyamakui no Kami|Oyamakui no Kami]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Engishiki Jinmyocho|Engishiki Jinmyocho]] ** [[Draft:Myojin Taisha|Myojin Taisha]] ** [[Draft:Kokushi genzaisha|Kokushi genzaisha]] ** [[Draft:Shikigeisha|Shikigeisha]] ** [[Draft:Shikinai Taisha|Shikinai Taisha]] * [[Draft:Shinko-shiki|Shinko-shiki]] * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Hakushu (Shinto)|Hakushu (Shinto)]] * [[Draft:Two bows, two claps, one bow|Two bows, two claps, one bow]] * [[Draft:Jichinsai|Jichinsai]] * [[Draft:Shrine Parishioner Registration|Shrine Parishioner Registration]] == Barnstar == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. == Pages I want to make == * {{ill|Agatainukai no Michiyo Haruto|lt=Agatainukai (no) Michiyo Haruto|ja|県犬養東人}} ** {{ill|Saonetsuhiko|ja|椎根津彦}} ** {{ill|Ichisi no Nagaochi|ja|市磯長尾市}} ** {{Ill|Nunaki-iri-hime|ja|渟名城入姫命}} == Drafts I'm most invested in {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. == Pages I want to make == * {{ill|Agatainukai no Michiyo Haruto|lt=Agatainukai (no) Michiyo Haruto|ja|県犬養東人}} ** {{ill|Shinetsuhiko|ja|椎根津彦}} ** {{ill|Ichishi no Nagaochi|ja|市磯長尾市}} ** {{Ill|Nunaki-iri-hime|ja|渟名城入姫命}} == Drafts I'm most invested in {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Inbe Shrine|Inbe Shrine]] * [[Draft:Watatsumi jinja|Watatsumi jinja]] * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Kanasana Shrine|Kanasana Shrine]] * [[Draft:Shikaumi Shrine|Shikaumi Shrine]] * [[Draft:Toyosaka and Noda Shrines|Toyosaka and Noda Shrines]] * [[Draft:Oarai Isosaki Shrine|Oarai Isosaki Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine|Ōmonoimi-jinja]] might be better called something like Chokaisan Omonoimi Shrine * [[Draft:Chōkai gassan ryōsho-gu|Chōkai gassan ryōsho-gu]] * [[Draft:Gosha-Suwa-jinja|Gosha-Suwa-jinja]] * [[Draft:Oyama Shrine (Mount Tate)|Oyama Shrine (Mount Tate)]] * [[Draft:Furogu Shrine|Furogu Shrine]] * [[Draft:Ōagata jinja|Ōagata jinja]] * [[Draft:Tagata Shrine|Tagata Shrine]] === Deities === * [[Draft:Omonoimi no Kami|Omonoimi no Kami]] * [[Draft:Chislobog|Chislobog]] * [[Draft:Yasakatome|Yasakatome]] * [[Draft:Oyamakui no Kami|Oyamakui no Kami]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Engishiki Jinmyocho|Engishiki Jinmyocho]] ** [[Draft:Myojin Taisha|Myojin Taisha]] ** [[Draft:Kokushi genzaisha|Kokushi genzaisha]] ** [[Draft:Shikigeisha|Shikigeisha]] ** [[Draft:Shikinai Taisha|Shikinai Taisha]] * [[Draft:Shinko-shiki|Shinko-shiki]] * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Hakushu (Shinto)|Hakushu (Shinto)]] * [[Draft:Two bows, two claps, one bow|Two bows, two claps, one bow]] * [[Draft:Shrine Parishioner Registration|Shrine Parishioner Registration]] == Barnstar == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Inbe Shrine|Inbe Shrine]] * [[Draft:Watatsumi jinja|Watatsumi jinja]] * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Kanasana Shrine|Kanasana Shrine]] * [[Draft:Shikaumi Shrine|Shikaumi Shrine]] * [[Draft:Toyosaka and Noda Shrines|Toyosaka and Noda Shrines]] * [[Draft:Oarai Isosaki Shrine|Oarai Isosaki Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine|Ōmonoimi-jinja]] might be better called something like Chokaisan Omonoimi Shrine * [[Draft:Chōkai gassan ryōsho-gu|Chōkai gassan ryōsho-gu]] * [[Draft:Gosha-Suwa-jinja|Gosha-Suwa-jinja]] * [[Draft:Oyama Shrine (Mount Tate)|Oyama Shrine (Mount Tate)]] * [[Draft:Furogu Shrine|Furogu Shrine]] * [[Draft:Ōagata jinja|Ōagata jinja]] * [[Draft:Tagata Shrine|Tagata Shrine]] === Deities === * [[Draft:Omonoimi no Kami|Omonoimi no Kami]] * [[Draft:Chislobog|Chislobog]] * [[Draft:Yasakatome|Yasakatome]] * [[Draft:Oyamakui no Kami|Oyamakui no Kami]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Engishiki Jinmyocho|Engishiki Jinmyocho]] ** [[Draft:Myojin Taisha|Myojin Taisha]] ** [[Draft:Kokushi genzaisha|Kokushi genzaisha]] ** [[Draft:Shikigeisha|Shikigeisha]] ** [[Draft:Shikinai Taisha|Shikinai Taisha]] * [[Draft:Shinko-shiki|Shinko-shiki]] * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Hakushu (Shinto)|Hakushu (Shinto)]] * [[Draft:Two bows, two claps, one bow|Two bows, two claps, one bow]] * [[Draft:Shrine Parishioner Registration|Shrine Parishioner Registration]] == Barnstar == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Inbe Shrine|Inbe Shrine]] * [[Draft:Watatsumi jinja|Watatsumi jinja]] * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Kanasana Shrine|Kanasana Shrine]] * [[Draft:Shikaumi Shrine|Shikaumi Shrine]] * [[Draft:Toyosaka and Noda Shrines|Toyosaka and Noda Shrines]] * [[Draft:Oarai Isosaki Shrine|Oarai Isosaki Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine|Ōmonoimi-jinja]] might be better called something like Chokaisan Omonoimi Shrine * [[Draft:Chōkai gassan ryōsho-gu|Chōkai gassan ryōsho-gu]] * [[Draft:Gosha-Suwa-jinja|Gosha-Suwa-jinja]] * [[Draft:Oyama Shrine (Mount Tate)|Oyama Shrine (Mount Tate)]] * [[Draft:Furogu Shrine|Furogu Shrine]] * [[Draft:Ōagata jinja|Ōagata jinja]] * [[Draft:Tagata Shrine|Tagata Shrine]] === Deities === * [[Draft:Omonoimi no Kami|Omonoimi no Kami]] * [[Draft:Chislobog|Chislobog]] * [[Draft:Yasakatome|Yasakatome]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Engishiki Jinmyocho|Engishiki Jinmyocho]] ** [[Draft:Myojin Taisha|Myojin Taisha]] ** [[Draft:Kokushi genzaisha|Kokushi genzaisha]] ** [[Draft:Shikigeisha|Shikigeisha]] ** [[Draft:Shikinai Taisha|Shikinai Taisha]] * [[Draft:Shinko-shiki|Shinko-shiki]] * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Hakushu (Shinto)|Hakushu (Shinto)]] * [[Draft:Two bows, two claps, one bow|Two bows, two claps, one bow]] * [[Draft:Shrine Parishioner Registration|Shrine Parishioner Registration]] == Barnstar == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Inbe Shrine|Inbe Shrine]] * [[Draft:Watatsumi jinja|Watatsumi jinja]] * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Kanasana Shrine|Kanasana Shrine]] * [[Draft:Shikaumi Shrine|Shikaumi Shrine]] * [[Draft:Toyosaka and Noda Shrines|Toyosaka and Noda Shrines]] * [[Draft:Oarai Isosaki Shrine|Oarai Isosaki Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine|Ōmonoimi-jinja]] might be better called something like Chokaisan Omonoimi Shrine * [[Draft:Chōkai gassan ryōsho-gu|Chōkai gassan ryōsho-gu]] * [[Draft:Gosha-Suwa-jinja|Gosha-Suwa-jinja]] * [[Draft:Oyama Shrine (Mount Tate)|Oyama Shrine (Mount Tate)]] * [[Draft:Furogu Shrine|Furogu Shrine]] * [[Draft:Ōagata jinja|Ōagata jinja]] * [[Draft:Tagata Shrine|Tagata Shrine]] === Deities === * [[Draft:Omonoimi no Kami|Omonoimi no Kami]] * [[Draft:Chislobog|Chislobog]] * [[Draft:Yasakatome|Yasakatome]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Engishiki Jinmyocho|Engishiki Jinmyocho]] ** [[Draft:Myojin Taisha|Myojin Taisha]] ** [[Draft:Kokushi genzaisha|Kokushi genzaisha]] ** [[Draft:Shikigeisha|Shikigeisha]] ** [[Draft:Shikinai Taisha|Shikinai Taisha]] * [[Draft:Shinko-shiki|Shinko-shiki]] * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Hakushu (Shinto)|Hakushu (Shinto)]] * [[Draft:Two bows, two claps, one bow|Two bows, two claps, one bow]] * [[Draft:Shrine Parishioner Registration|Shrine Parishioner Registration]] == Barnstar == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. {{DISPLAYTITLE:User:''Imman''''uelle''}}

{{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Inbe Shrine|Inbe Shrine]] * [[Draft:Watatsumi jinja|Watatsumi jinja]] * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Kanasana Shrine|Kanasana Shrine]] * [[Draft:Shikaumi Shrine|Shikaumi Shrine]] * [[Draft:Oarai Isosaki Shrine|Oarai Isosaki Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine|Ōmonoimi-jinja]] might be better called something like Chokaisan Omonoimi Shrine * [[Draft:Tagata Shrine|Tagata Shrine]] === Deities === * [[Draft:Omonoimi no Kami|Omonoimi no Kami]] * [[Draft:Chislobog|Chislobog]] * [[Draft:Yasakatome|Yasakatome]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Engishiki Jinmyocho|Engishiki Jinmyocho]] ** [[Draft:Myojin Taisha|Myojin Taisha]] ** [[Draft:Kokushi genzaisha|Kokushi genzaisha]] ** [[Draft:Shikigeisha|Shikigeisha]] ** [[Draft:Shikinai Taisha|Shikinai Taisha]] * [[Draft:Shinko-shiki|Shinko-shiki]] * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Hakushu (Shinto)|Hakushu (Shinto)]] * [[Draft:Two bows, two claps, one bow|Two bows, two claps, one bow]] * [[Draft:Shrine Parishioner Registration|Shrine Parishioner Registration]] == Barnstar == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Inbe Shrine|Inbe Shrine]] * [[Draft:Watatsumi jinja|Watatsumi jinja]] * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Kanasana Shrine|Kanasana Shrine]] * [[Draft:Shikaumi Shrine|Shikaumi Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine|Ōmonoimi-jinja]] might be better called something like Chokaisan Omonoimi Shrine * [[Draft:Tagata Shrine|Tagata Shrine]] === Deities === * [[Draft:Omonoimi no Kami|Omonoimi no Kami]] * [[Draft:Yasakatome|Yasakatome]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Engishiki Jinmyocho|Engishiki Jinmyocho]] ** [[Draft:Myojin Taisha|Myojin Taisha]] ** [[Draft:Kokushi genzaisha|Kokushi genzaisha]] ** [[Draft:Shikigeisha|Shikigeisha]] ** [[Draft:Shikinai Taisha|Shikinai Taisha]] * [[Draft:Shinko-shiki|Shinko-shiki]] * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Hakushu (Shinto)|Hakushu (Shinto)]] * [[Draft:Two bows, two claps, one bow|Two bows, two claps, one bow]] * [[Draft:Shrine Parishioner Registration|Shrine Parishioner Registration]] == Barnstar == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Inbe Shrine|Inbe Shrine]] * [[Draft:Watatsumi Shrine|Watatsumi jinja]] * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Kanasana Shrine|Kanasana Shrine]] * [[Draft:Shikaumi Shrine|Shikaumi Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine|Ōmonoimi-jinja]] might be better called something like Chokaisan Omonoimi Shrine * [[Draft:Hiromine Shrine|Hiromine Shrine]] === Deities === * [[Draft:Yasakatome|Yasakatome]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Engishiki Jinmyocho|Engishiki Jinmyocho]] * [[Draft:Shinko-shiki|Shinko-shiki]] * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Hakushu (Shinto)|Hakushu (Shinto)]] * [[Draft:Two bows, two claps, one bow|Two bows, two claps, one bow]] * [[Draft:Shrine Parishioner Registration|Shrine Parishioner Registration]] == Barnstar == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. [[User:Poketama|Poketama]] ([[User talk:Poketama|talk]]) 04:47, 1 May 2023 (UTC)|alt|[[File:Systemic bias Barnstar.png|100px]]|[[File:Systemic bias Barnstar.png|100px]]}} |rowspan="2" | |style="font-size: x-large; padding: 0; vertical-align: middle; height: 1.1em;" | '''The Systemic Bias Barnstar''' |- |style="vertical-align: middle; border-top: 2px solid gray;" | For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. [[User:Poketama|Poketama]] ([[User talk:Poketama|talk]]) 04:47, 1 May 2023 (UTC) |} {| style="background-color: #fdffe7; border: 1px solid #fceb92;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: middle; padding: 5px;" | [[File:Special Barnstar Hires.png|100px]] |style="font-size: x-large; padding: 3px 3px 0 3px; height: 1.5em;" | '''The Special Barnstar''' |- |style="vertical-align: middle; padding: 3px;" | Thank you for your service [...] For your creation of essential Japanese topics and other subjects. Thought it would be nice to give you a star for all your hard work. {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Kanasana Shrine|Kanasana Shrine]] * [[Draft:Shikaumi Shrine|Shikaumi Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine|Ōmonoimi-jinja]] might be better called something like Chokaisan Omonoimi Shrine * [[Draft:Hiromine Shrine|Hiromine Shrine]] === Deities === * [[Draft:Yasakatome|Yasakatome]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Shinko-shiki|Shinko-shiki]] * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Shrine Parishioner Registration|Shrine Parishioner Registration]] == Barnstar == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Kanasana Shrine|Kanasana Shrine]] * [[Draft:Shikaumi Shrine|Shikaumi Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine| Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine]] Chokaisan Omonoimi Shrine * [[Draft:Hiromine Shrine|Hiromine Shrine]] === Deities === * [[Draft:Yasakatome|Yasakatome]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Shinko-shiki|Shinko-shiki]] * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Shrine Parishioner Registration|Shrine Parishioner Registration]] == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] I currently have [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118|3,924 drafts]]. My aim is to reduce this by at least 1000 in six months. But it is really plausible I can do more. Draft progress * [https://archive.ph/K5Nzl November 4, 2023] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Kanasana Shrine|Kanasana Shrine]] * [[Draft:Shikaumi Shrine|Shikaumi Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine| Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine]] Chokaisan Omonoimi Shrine * [[Draft:Hiromine Shrine|Hiromine Shrine]] === Deities === * [[Draft:Yasakatome|Yasakatome]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Shinko-shiki|Shinko-shiki]] * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Shrine Parishioner Registration|Shrine Parishioner Registration]] == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] I currently have [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118|3,924 drafts]]. My aim is to reduce this by at least 1000 in six months. But it is really plausible I can do more. == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * [https://archive.ph/K5Nzl November 4, 2023: 3,924 drafts] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Kanasana Shrine|Kanasana Shrine]] * [[Draft:Shikaumi Shrine|Shikaumi Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine| Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine]] Chokaisan Omonoimi Shrine * [[Draft:Hiromine Shrine|Hiromine Shrine]] === Deities === * [[Draft:Yasakatome|Yasakatome]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Shinko-shiki|Shinko-shiki]] * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Shrine Parishioner Registration|Shrine Parishioner Registration]] == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] I currently have [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118|3,924 drafts]]. My aim is to reduce this by at least 1000 in six months. But it is really plausible I can do more. == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts * [https://archive.ph/K5Nzl November 4, 2023: 3,924 drafts] [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Kanasana Shrine|Kanasana Shrine]] * [[Draft:Shikaumi Shrine|Shikaumi Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine| Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine]] Chokaisan Omonoimi Shrine * [[Draft:Hiromine Shrine|Hiromine Shrine]] === Deities === * [[Draft:Yasakatome|Yasakatome]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Shinko-shiki|Shinko-shiki]] * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Shrine Parishioner Registration|Shrine Parishioner Registration]] == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] I currently have [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118|3,924 drafts]]. My aim is to reduce this by at least 1000 in six months. But it is really plausible I can do more. == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts * [https://archive.ph/wip/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Kanasana Shrine|Kanasana Shrine]] * [[Draft:Shikaumi Shrine|Shikaumi Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine| Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine]] Chokaisan Omonoimi Shrine * [[Draft:Hiromine Shrine|Hiromine Shrine]] === Deities === * [[Draft:Yasakatome|Yasakatome]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Shinko-shiki|Shinko-shiki]] * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Shrine Parishioner Registration|Shrine Parishioner Registration]] == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Kanasana Shrine|Kanasana Shrine]] * [[Draft:Shikaumi Shrine|Shikaumi Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine| Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine]] Chokaisan Omonoimi Shrine * [[Draft:Hiromine Shrine|Hiromine Shrine]] === Deities === * [[Draft:Yasakatome|Yasakatome]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Shinko-shiki|Shinko-shiki]] * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Shrine Parishioner Registration|Shrine Parishioner Registration]] == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. revision.comment: Had to come back from my break for a bit. Defended myself against a serious accusation, and did a bit of minor stuff. Tweaks to rejected submissions, and altering my user page to reflect the fact I have either given up on many of these drafts or they have been accepted, and bumped or g7ed some drafts. I am now gonna be gone again.
revision.text:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:User:''Imman''''uelle''}} I'm on a break. It's gonna be at least November 11th that I'll come back. So if you need me contact me on discord. Thank you. [[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(talk to the cutest Wikipedian)]] 02:41, 5 November 2023 (UTC) :Had to take a small break from my break but I promise it will now be until at least the 13th that I continue this break[[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(talk to the cutest Wikipedian)]] 03:04, 7 November 2023 (UTC)

{{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine|Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine]] * [[Draft:Hiromine Shrine|Hiromine Shrine]] === Deities === * [[Draft:Yasakatome|Yasakatome]] * [[Draft:Kunitama|Kunitama]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Shinko-shiki|Shinko-shiki]] * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Shrine Parishioner Registration|Shrine Parishioner Registration]] * [[Draft:Tensha Tsuchimikado Shinto|Tensha Tsuchimikado Shinto]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko]] * [[Draft:Owari clan|Owari clan]] == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. [[User:Poketama|Poketama]] ([[User talk:Poketama|talk]]) 04:47, 1 May 2023 (UTC)|alt|[[File:Systemic bias Barnstar.png|100px]]|[[File:Systemic bias Barnstar.png|100px]]}} |rowspan="2" | |style="font-size: x-large; padding: 0; vertical-align: middle; height: 1.1em;" | '''The Systemic Bias Barnstar''' |- |style="vertical-align: middle; border-top: 2px solid gray;" | For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. [[User:Poketama|Poketama]] ([[User talk:Poketama|talk]]) 04:47, 1 May 2023 (UTC) |} {| style="background-color: #fdffe7; border: 1px solid #fceb92;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: middle; padding: 5px;" | [[File:Special Barnstar Hires.png|100px]] |style="font-size: x-large; padding: 3px 3px 0 3px; height: 1.5em;" | '''The Special Barnstar''' |- |style="vertical-align: middle; padding: 3px;" | Thank you for your service [...] For your creation of essential Japanese topics and other subjects. {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] * [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118/noredirects/live|current progress]] [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine|Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine]] * [[Draft:Hiromine Shrine|Hiromine Shrine]] === Deities === * [[Draft:Yasakatome|Yasakatome]] * [[Draft:Kunitama|Kunitama]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Shinko-shiki|Shinko-shiki]] * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Shrine Parishioner Registration|Shrine Parishioner Registration]] * [[Draft:Tensha Tsuchimikado Shinto|Tensha Tsuchimikado Shinto]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko]] * [[Draft:Owari clan|Owari clan]] == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/XU3ii November 7, 2023, 3,500 drafts] * [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118/noredirects/live|current progress]] [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine|Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine]] * [[Draft:Hiromine Shrine|Hiromine Shrine]] === Deities === * [[Draft:Kunitama|Kunitama]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Shrine Parishioner Registration|Shrine Parishioner Registration]] * [[Draft:Tensha Tsuchimikado Shinto|Tensha Tsuchimikado Shinto]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko]] * [[Draft:Owari clan|Owari clan]] == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. {{DISPLAYTITLE:User:''Imman''''uelle''}} I'm on a break. It's gonna be at least November 11th that I'll come back. So if you need me contact me on discord. Thank you. [[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(talk to the cutest Wikipedian)]] 02:41, 5 November 2023 (UTC) :Had to take a small break from my break but I promise it will now be until at least the 13th that I continue this break[[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(talk to the cutest Wikipedian)]] 03:04, 7 November 2023 (UTC)

{{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/XU3ii November 7, 2023, 3,500 drafts] * [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118/noredirects/live|current progress]] [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine|Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine]] === Deities === * [[Draft:Kunitama|Kunitama]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Shrine Parishioner Registration|Shrine Parishioner Registration]] * [[Draft:Tensha Tsuchimikado Shinto|Tensha Tsuchimikado Shinto]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko]] * [[Draft:Owari clan|Owari clan]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages.
