{{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/XU3ii November 7, 2023, 3,500 drafts] * [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118/noredirects/live|current progress]] [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine|Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Tensha Tsuchimikado Shinto|Tensha Tsuchimikado Shinto]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko]] * [[Draft:Owari clan|Owari clan]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/XU3ii November 7, 2023, 3,500 drafts] * [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118/noredirects/live|current progress]] [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine|Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko]] * [[Draft:Owari clan|Owari clan]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/XU3ii November 7, 2023: 3,500 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/Qfp1o November 9, 2023: 3,433 drafts] * [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118/noredirects/live|current progress]] [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine|Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko]] * [[Draft:Owari clan|Owari clan]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/XU3ii November 7, 2023: 3,500 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/Qfp1o November 9, 2023: 3,433 drafts] * [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118/noredirects/live|current progress]] [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine|Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko]] * [[Draft:Owari clan|Owari clan]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/XU3ii November 7, 2023: 3,500 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/Qfp1o November 9, 2023: 3,433 drafts] * [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118/noredirects/live|current progress]] [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine|Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine]] * [[Draft:Koxinga Shrine|Koxinga Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine|Nashinoki Shrine]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko]] * [[Draft:Owari clan|Owari clan]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/XU3ii November 7, 2023: 3,500 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/Qfp1o November 9, 2023: 3,433 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/yTRPe November 11, 2023: 3,423 drafts] * [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118/noredirects/live|current progress]] [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Shrines === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine|Chōkaisan Ōmonoimi Shrine]] * [[Draft:Koxinga Shrine|Koxinga Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine|Nashinoki Shrine]] === Concepts === * [[Draft:Shinshi|Shinshi]] * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko]] * [[Draft:Owari clan|Owari clan]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/XU3ii November 7, 2023: 3,500 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/Qfp1o November 9, 2023: 3,433 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/yTRPe November 11, 2023: 3,423 drafts] * [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118/noredirects/live|current progress]] [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/XU3ii November 7, 2023: 3,500 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/Qfp1o November 9, 2023: 3,433 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/yTRPe November 11, 2023: 3,423 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/mGe3M November 12, 2023: 3,416 drafts] * [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118/noredirects/live|current progress]] [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Concepts === * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko]] * [[Draft:Owari clan|Owari clan]] * [[Draft:Amabe clan|Amabe clan]] === Future but undeveloped ones === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine|Nashinoki Shrine]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. revision.comment: Added new list of rejected drafts I have not given up on. This isn’t to say I necessarily will refuse to improve others but this group I really see as promising.
revision.text: {{DISPLAYTITLE:User:''Imman''''uelle''}} While my break didn't go as planned last week due to the chaos of AFC finally working. I do intend on doing a proper break now which hopefully will be more successful[[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(talk to the cutest Wikipedian)]] 03:13, 13 November 2023 (UTC) {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} I'm a kawaii vtuber catgirl. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/XU3ii November 7, 2023: 3,500 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/Qfp1o November 9, 2023: 3,433 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/yTRPe November 11, 2023: 3,423 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/mGe3M November 12, 2023: 3,416 drafts] * [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118/noredirects/live|current progress]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] == ones I’ve not given up on yet * [[Draft:Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko]] * [[Draft:Owari clan]] * [[Draft:Mirabilis Ventures Inc]] * [[Draft:Inbe Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine]] * [[Draft:Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)]] * [[Draft:具]] * [[Draft:Mikeiri no Mikoto]] * [[Draft:Oyamakui no Kami]] * [[Draft:Mani Temple]] * [[Draft:Tagata Shrine]] * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami]] * [[Draft:Umashiashikabihikoji]] * [[Draft:Amabe clan]] * [[Draft:Kamiyo Ame Candy]] * [[Draft:Shinto Shrine of Shusse Inari in America]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Concepts === * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko]] * [[Draft:Owari clan|Owari clan]] * [[Draft:Amabe clan|Amabe clan]] === Future but undeveloped ones === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine|Nashinoki Shrine]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. [[User:Poketama|Poketama]] ([[User talk:Poketama|talk]]) 04:47, 1 May 2023 (UTC)|alt|[[File:Systemic bias Barnstar.png|100px]]|[[File:Systemic bias Barnstar.png|100px]]}} |rowspan="2" | |style="font-size: x-large; padding: 0; vertical-align: middle; height: 1.1em;" | '''The Systemic Bias Barnstar''' |- |style="vertical-align: middle; border-top: 2px solid gray;" | For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. [[User:Poketama|Poketama]] ([[User talk:Poketama|talk]]) 04:47, 1 May 2023 (UTC) |} {| style="background-color: #fdffe7; border: 1px solid #fceb92;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: middle; padding: 5px;" | [[File:Special Barnstar Hires.png|100px]] |style="font-size: x-large; padding: 3px 3px 0 3px; height: 1.5em;" | '''The Special Barnstar''' |- |style="vertical-align: middle; padding: 3px;" | Thank you for your service [...] For your creation of essential Japanese topics and other subjects. Thought it would be nice to give you a star for all your hard work. [[User:11a22b33c44d55e|11a22b33c44d55e]] ([[User talk:11a22b33c44d55e|talk]]) 14:10, 31 October 2023 (UTC) |} == Navboxes == I didn't necessarily make these navboxes, but rather I contributed a lot to the articles and contents * [[Template:Manichaeism footer]] * [[Template:State Shinto]] * [[Template:Shinto shrines]] (not made by me but I fixed it up and made it a lot more useful) * [[Template:Religious Confucianism]] * [[Template:Yamatai]] == Article rehabilitation == I am going to redo all of my pages I created or contributed highly to to get them up to a quality I want. {{DISPLAYTITLE:User:''Imman''''uelle''}} While my break didn't go as planned last week due to the chaos of AFC finally working. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. really appreciate help on == These drafts are ones I think are promising but I really don’t think I have the capabilities to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Concepts === * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko]] * [[Draft:Owari clan|Owari clan]] * [[Draft:Amabe clan|Amabe clan]] === Future but undeveloped ones === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine|Nashinoki Shrine]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. really appreciate help on == These drafts are ones I think are promising but I really don’t think I have the capabilities to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Concepts === * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko]] * [[Draft:Owari clan|Owari clan]] * [[Draft:Amabe clan|Amabe clan]] === Future but undeveloped ones === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine|Nashinoki Shrine]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * [https://archive.ph/mi0W9 October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/XU3ii November 7, 2023: 3,500 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/Qfp1o November 9, 2023: 3,433 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/yTRPe November 11, 2023: 3,423 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/mGe3M November 12, 2023: 3,416 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/40YDl November 14, 2023: 3,405 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/HLqjm November 16, 2023: 3,339 drafts] * [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118/noredirects/live|current progress]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] == ones I’ve not given up on yet * [[Draft:Mirabilis Ventures Inc]] * [[Draft:Inbe Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine]] * [[Draft:Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)]] * [[Draft:具]] * [[Draft:Mikeiri no Mikoto]] * [[Draft:Oyamakui no Kami]] * [[Draft:Mani Temple]] * [[Draft:Tagata Shrine]] * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami]] * [[Draft:Umashiashikabihikoji]] * [[Draft:Amabe clan]] * [[Draft:Kamiyo Ame Candy]] * [[Draft:Shinto Shrine of Shusse Inari in America]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] ==drafts I’d really appreciate help on == These drafts are ones I think are promising but I really don’t think I have the capabilities to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Concepts === * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Amabe clan|Amabe clan]] === Future but undeveloped ones === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine|Nashinoki Shrine]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * [https://archive.ph/mi0W9 October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/XU3ii November 7, 2023: 3,500 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/Qfp1o November 9, 2023: 3,433 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/yTRPe November 11, 2023: 3,423 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/mGe3M November 12, 2023: 3,416 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/40YDl November 14, 2023: 3,405 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/HLqjm November 16, 2023: 3,339 drafts] * [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118/noredirects/live|current progress]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] == ones I’ve not given up on yet * [[Draft:Mirabilis Ventures Inc]] * [[Draft:Inbe Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine]] * [[Draft:Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)]] * [[Draft:具]] * [[Draft:Mikeiri no Mikoto]] * [[Draft:Oyamakui no Kami]] * [[Draft:Mani Temple]] * [[Draft:Tagata Shrine]] * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami]] * [[Draft:Umashiashikabihikoji]] * [[Draft:Amabe clan]] * [[Draft:Kamiyo Ame Candy]] * [[Draft:Shinto Shrine of Shusse Inari in America]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] ==drafts I’d really appreciate help on == These drafts are ones I think are promising but I really don’t think I have the capabilities to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Concepts === * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Amabe clan|Amabe clan]] === Future but undeveloped ones === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine|Nashinoki Shrine]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]] and I love using [[VRChat]]. I'm a witch. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * [https://archive.ph/mi0W9 October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/XU3ii November 7, 2023: 3,500 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/Qfp1o November 9, 2023: 3,433 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/yTRPe November 11, 2023: 3,423 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/mGe3M November 12, 2023: 3,416 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/40YDl November 14, 2023: 3,405 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/HLqjm November 16, 2023: 3,339 drafts] * [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118/noredirects/live|current progress]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] == ones I’ve not given up on yet * [[Draft:Mirabilis Ventures Inc]] * [[Draft:Inbe Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine]] * [[Draft:Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)]] * [[Draft:具]] * [[Draft:Mikeiri no Mikoto]] * [[Draft:Mani Temple]] * [[Draft:Tagata Shrine]] * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami]] * [[Draft:Umashiashikabihikoji]] * [[Draft:Amabe clan]] * [[Draft:Kamiyo Ame Candy]] * [[Draft:Shinto Shrine of Shusse Inari in America]] * [[Draft:Oarai Isosaki Shrine]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] ==drafts I’d really appreciate help on == These drafts are ones I think are promising but I really don’t think I have the capabilities to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Concepts === * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Amabe clan|Amabe clan]] === Future but undeveloped ones === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine|Nashinoki Shrine]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. [[Draft:Shinto Shrine of Shusse Inari in America]] * [[Draft:Oarai Isosaki Shrine]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] ==drafts I’d really appreciate help on == These drafts are ones I think are promising but I really don’t think I have the capabilities to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Concepts === * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Amabe clan|Amabe clan]] === Future but undeveloped ones === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine|Nashinoki Shrine]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. ones I think are promising but I really don’t think I have the capabilities to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Concepts === * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Amabe clan|Amabe clan]] === Future but undeveloped ones === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine|Nashinoki Shrine]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. really don’t think I have the capabilities to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Concepts === * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Amabe clan|Amabe clan]] === Future but undeveloped ones === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine|Nashinoki Shrine]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * [https://archive.ph/mi0W9 October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/XU3ii November 7, 2023: 3,500 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/Qfp1o November 9, 2023: 3,433 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/yTRPe November 11, 2023: 3,423 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/mGe3M November 12, 2023: 3,416 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/40YDl November 14, 2023: 3,405 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/HLqjm November 16, 2023: 3,339 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/S5qEc November 17, 2023: 3,296 drafts] * [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118/noredirects/live|current progress]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] == ones I’ve not given up on yet * [[Draft:Mirabilis Ventures Inc]] * [[Draft:Inbe Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine]] * [[Draft:具]] * [[Draft:Mani Temple]] * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami]] * [[Draft:Kamiyo Ame Candy]] * [[Draft:Makimuku Ishizuka Kofun]] === Active === *[[Draft:Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)]] * [[Draft:Amabe clan]] * [[Draft:Mikeiri no Mikoto]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] ==drafts I’d really appreciate help on == These drafts are ones I think are promising but I really don’t think I have the capabilities to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Concepts === * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Amabe clan|Amabe clan]] === Future but undeveloped ones === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine|Nashinoki Shrine]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * [https://archive.ph/mi0W9 October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/XU3ii November 7, 2023: 3,500 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/Qfp1o November 9, 2023: 3,433 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/yTRPe November 11, 2023: 3,423 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/mGe3M November 12, 2023: 3,416 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/40YDl November 14, 2023: 3,405 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/HLqjm November 16, 2023: 3,339 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/S5qEc November 17, 2023: 3,296 drafts] * [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118/noredirects/live|current progress]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] == ones I’ve not given up on yet * [[Draft:Mirabilis Ventures Inc]] * [[Draft:Inbe Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine]] * [[Draft:具]] * [[Draft:Mani Temple]] * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami]] * [[Draft:Kamiyo Ame Candy]] * [[Draft:Makimuku Ishizuka Kofun]] === Active === *[[Draft:Amabe clan]] * [[Draft:Mikeiri no Mikoto]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] ==drafts I’d really appreciate help on == These drafts are ones I think are promising but I really don’t think I have the capabilities to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Concepts === * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Amabe clan|Amabe clan]] === Future but undeveloped ones === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine|Nashinoki Shrine]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages.
