My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Concepts === * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Amabe clan|Amabe clan]] === Future but undeveloped ones === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine|Nashinoki Shrine]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * [https://archive.ph/mi0W9 October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/XU3ii November 7, 2023: 3,500 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/Qfp1o November 9, 2023: 3,433 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/yTRPe November 11, 2023: 3,423 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/mGe3M November 12, 2023: 3,416 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/40YDl November 14, 2023: 3,405 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/HLqjm November 16, 2023: 3,339 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/S5qEc November 17, 2023: 3,296 drafts] * [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118/noredirects/live|current progress]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] == ones I’ve not given up on yet * [[Draft:Mirabilis Ventures Inc]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine]] * [[Draft:具]] * [[Draft:Mani Temple]] * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami]] * [[Draft:Kamiyo Ame Candy]] * [[Draft:Makimuku Ishizuka Kofun]] === Active === *[[Draft:Amabe clan]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] ==drafts I’d really appreciate help on == These drafts are ones I think are promising but I really don’t think I have the capabilities to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Concepts === * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Amabe clan|Amabe clan]] === Future but undeveloped ones === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine|Nashinoki Shrine]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * [https://archive.ph/mi0W9 October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/XU3ii November 7, 2023: 3,500 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/Qfp1o November 9, 2023: 3,433 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/yTRPe November 11, 2023: 3,423 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/mGe3M November 12, 2023: 3,416 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/40YDl November 14, 2023: 3,405 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/HLqjm November 16, 2023: 3,339 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/S5qEc November 17, 2023: 3,296 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/2qJoJ November 20, 2023: 3,273 drafts] * [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118/noredirects/live|current progress]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] == ones I’ve not given up on yet * [[Draft:Mirabilis Ventures Inc]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine]] * [[Draft:具]] * [[Draft:Mani Temple]] * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami]] * [[Draft:Kamiyo Ame Candy]] * [[Draft:Makimuku Ishizuka Kofun]] === Active === *[[Draft:Amabe clan]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] ==drafts I’d really appreciate help on == These drafts are ones I think are promising but I really don’t think I have the capabilities to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Concepts === * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Amabe clan|Amabe clan]] === Future but undeveloped ones === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine|Nashinoki Shrine]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. I'm also a transhumanist. I'm easiest to contact on [[discord]]. [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&limit=500&offset=0&ns118=1&search=incategory%3A%22Pending+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22 Active draft submissions] == Draft progress * [https://archive.ph/mi0W9 October 20, 2023: 3,946 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/0y7Va November 4, 2023: 3,522 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/XU3ii November 7, 2023: 3,500 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/Qfp1o November 9, 2023: 3,433 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/yTRPe November 11, 2023: 3,423 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/mGe3M November 12, 2023: 3,416 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/40YDl November 14, 2023: 3,405 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/HLqjm November 16, 2023: 3,339 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/S5qEc November 17, 2023: 3,296 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/2qJoJ November 20, 2023: 3,273 drafts] * [https://archive.ph/WC0xZ November 21, 2023: 3,256 drafts] * [[xtools:pages/en.wikipedia.org/Immanuelle/118/noredirects/live|current progress]] == [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=incategory%3A%22Declined+AfC+submissions%22+insource%3A%22u%3DImmanuelle%22&title=Special:Search&profile=advanced&fulltext=1&ns118=1 Declined submissions] == ones I’ve not given up on yet * [[Draft:Mirabilis Ventures Inc]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine]] * [[Draft:具]] * [[Draft:Mani Temple]] * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami]] * [[Draft:Kamiyo Ame Candy]] * [[Draft:Makimuku Ishizuka Kofun]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] ==drafts I’d really appreciate help on == These drafts are ones I think are promising but I really don’t think I have the capabilities to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Concepts === * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] === Clans === * [[Draft:Amabe clan|Amabe clan]] === Future but undeveloped ones === * [[Draft:Kaijin Shrine|Kaijin Shrine]] * [[Draft:Nashinoki Shrine|Nashinoki Shrine]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Concepts === * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] * [[Draft:Watatsumi Shrine (Kobe)]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. submissions] == ones I’ve not given up on yet * [[Draft:Mirabilis Ventures Inc]] * [[Draft:具]] * [[Draft:Mani Temple]] * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami]] * [[Draft:Kamiyo Ame Candy]] * [[Draft:Makimuku Ishizuka Kofun]] [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] ==The most pleasant experience == I'm seeing [[User:Cewbot]] remove all these interlanguagelinks because my drafts were finally approved [[File:The most pleasant experience.png|thumb]] ==drafts I’d really appreciate help on == These drafts are ones I think are promising but I really don’t think I have the capabilities to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == === Concepts === * [[Draft:Yaoyorozu no Kami|Yaoyorozu no Kami]] * [[Draft:Watatsumi Shrine (Kobe)]] == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. [[User:Poketama|Poketama]] ([[User talk:Poketama|talk]]) 04:47, 1 May 2023 (UTC)|alt|[[File:Systemic bias Barnstar.png|100px]]|[[File:Systemic bias Barnstar.png|100px]]}} |rowspan="2" | |style="font-size: x-large; padding: 0; vertical-align: middle; height: 1.1em;" | '''The Systemic Bias Barnstar''' |- |style="vertical-align: middle; border-top: 2px solid gray;" | For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. were finally approved [[File:The most pleasant experience.png|thumb]] ==drafts I’d really appreciate help on == These drafts are ones I think are promising but I really don’t think I have the capabilities to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. == * [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] ==The most pleasant experience == I'm seeing [[User:Cewbot]] remove all these interlanguagelinks because my drafts were finally approved [[File:The most pleasant experience.png|thumb]] ==drafts I’d really appreciate help on == These drafts are ones I think are promising but I really don’t think I have the capabilities to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. == * [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] ==The most pleasant experience == I'm seeing [[User:Cewbot]] remove all these interlanguagelinks because my drafts were finally approved [[File:The most pleasant experience.png|thumb]] ==drafts I’d really appreciate help on == These drafts are ones I think are promising but I really don’t think I have the capabilities to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. finally approved [[File:The most pleasant experience.png|thumb]] ==drafts I’d really appreciate help on == These drafts are ones I think are promising but I really don’t think I have the capabilities to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. Declined submissions] == * [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] ==The most pleasant experience == I'm seeing [[User:Cewbot]] remove all these interlanguagelinks because my drafts were finally approved [[File:The most pleasant experience.png|thumb]] ==drafts I’d really appreciate help on == These drafts are ones I think are promising but I really don’t think I have the capabilities to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. finally approved [[File:The most pleasant experience.png|thumb]] ==drafts I’d really appreciate help on == These drafts are ones I think are promising but I really don’t think I have the capabilities to do myself * [[Draft:Tarishihiko]] == How I operate with drafts == as you can see with this page [[User:Immanuelle/Draft Staggering]] I have been making an attempt to track my drafts and document when they will expire, alongside staggering them to prevent being overwhelmed at any given time. My policy with Chinese character drafts up until this point has been bump every character that does not already have a page. I’ve done this because a sizable portion have pages already that I wish to clear. i am finished with the [[Kyōiku kanji]] now. Due to a category being deleted all thousand secondary school kanji will be deleted on the same day, which I’m indifferent to because much fear had any page potential, so with a few exceptions which I have already bumped I will not bump any of them. Assuming I am allowed to keep using drafts as I please I intend on actively searching through the kyoiku kanji and making decisions on the articles, and letting most expire the second time around. I will look at a few characters a day and make substantial edits to them including comments on my thought process for each character. This will allow for the development of more substantial reasoning on whether to keep the characters and also help me avoid getting swamped by a large amount of warnings on any given day. i have already been doing this with my drafts before, but it is not obvious to outside observers who only saw my drafts from the recent glut. After May 5th 2024 there will be a stark decrease in the amount of draft messages I get. On May 6 I did bump a lot of articles but this will be a day of more bumps. But there will be a large period of little messages at this point. I'm a little afraid there may be a paradox of me doing so much draft editing due to the ANI that I end up with almost every draft potentially g17ing 5-6 months after the start of it. We will have to see about that over a week due to the afc backlog drive I got a lot of drafts finished and in mainspace with the final resolution of the ANI in November 14 I’ve decided not to bump any more drafts and let everything g13 on its own. == Drafts I'm most invested in currently == == Misc == {| style="left: 1em auto 1em auto" |{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Anime and manga/Userbox/User SOS Brigade}} |{{User:Dragfyre/UBX/Rozen Maiden}} |} == Barnstars == {| style="border: 2px solid navy; background-color: AliceBlue;" |rowspan="2" style="vertical-align:middle;" |{{#ifeq:For continual high quality editing on neglected Chinese and Japanese topics and pages. {{DISPLAYTITLE:User:''Imman''''uelle''}} {{Infobox philosopher|region=[[Western philosophy]]|era=[[21st-century philosophy]]|main_interests={{cslist | [[Object-oriented ontology]] | [[Philosophy of religion]] | [[Transhumanism]] | [[Syntheism]] }}|influences={{Flatlist}} * [[Wang Yangming]] * [[Yamazaki Ansai]] * [[Nikolai Fyodorovich Fyodorov]] * [[Mark Fisher]] * [[Draft:John Vervaeke|John Vervaeke]]|name=Immanuelle Leonhart|image=Immanuelle.png|notable_ideas=[[User:Immanuelle/Catgirlism|Catgirlism]]}}{{User MAWcustom|4450}} [[simple:User:Immanuelle]] [[nl:User:Immanuelle]] == Thoughts on my editing restrictions == I understand why they were put in place. But my thought is basically I see them as having been a bit excessive, but I think the motive for introduction was reasonable. The fact that I can edit here means that they are definitely a lot less stressful than they would have been had I had no other outlets. Although at this point I feel The main way I felt they were unfair to me is that they were focusing on some of my worst articles from a long time before I got the hang of doing things. But at the same time I definitely did not have that good knowledge. I have studied Japanese since then because while I was kind of all over the place beforehand, I discovered my interest in Shinto while editing Wikipedia. The thing that really irritated me was getting stuck in AFC, draining myself on finding trivial references to try to get shrines through that I knew were notable from the jawiki articles, instead of focusing on more meaningful analytical content. I feel like on this wiki I have gotten at least close to covering all the stuff I generally want to write about. I find it much better to operate on a translated version of a Japanese article and then find english sources to enhance it or similar rather than struggling from english sources alone. English academic sources generally are better. ==My dream scenario (unrealistic)== Every page on this wiki gets imported to my userspace on wikipedia. With the [[:Category:Source Everybodywiki]] pages having their histories merged in. I will put an [[Template:AfC comment|afc comment]] on every page explaining how Japanese speaking reviewers are desired, etc. Ideally before importing since I can do that with the tools I learned to use here. Generally explaining how there is an odd history with these pages, whatever is needed. I will move a reasonable amount into draftspace to work on and submit. Not 2,000 at once. I have a lot of pages here, but I don't want to have an unusable talk page full of deletion notices again. Generally speaking if an article is rejected for lack of notability or similar. I will just want to actually let them g7 delete. Many of these might just not actually be worth articles. ==My coat of arms== [[File:Leonhart_Arms.svg|thumb]] [[Category:LGBT+ Wikipedians]]

Some things like say [[Homi Shrine (沼津市根古屋)]] are completed and worth a try, probably will get rejected but worth giving them a shot, some like [[Yuga Daigongen]] I will want to try a few times. Some like [[History of Shinto shrines in Okinawa]] I could go through 5 declines and still be passionate to complete it. ==My coat of arms== [[File:Leonhart_Arms.svg|thumb]] [[Category:LGBT+ Wikipedians]]

I find it much better to operate on a translated version of a Japanese article and then find english sources to enhance it or similar rather than struggling from english sources alone. English academic sources generally are better. ==My dream scenario (unrealistic)== Every page on this wiki gets imported to my userspace on wikipedia. With the [[:Category:Source Everybodywiki]] pages having their histories merged in. I will put an [[Template:AfC comment|afc comment]] on every page explaining how Japanese speaking reviewers are desired, etc. Ideally before importing since I can do that with the tools I learned to use here. Generally explaining how there is an odd history with these pages, whatever is needed. I will move a reasonable amount into draftspace to work on and submit. Not 2,000 at once. I have a lot of pages here, but I don't want to have an unusable talk page full of deletion notices again. Generally speaking if an article is declined for lack of notability or similar. I will just want to actually let them g7 delete. Many of these might just not actually be worth articles. Some things like say [[Homi Shrine (沼津市根古屋)]] are completed and worth a try, probably will get rejected but worth giving them a shot, some like [[Yuga Daigongen]] I will want to try a few times. Some like [[History of Shinto shrines in Okinawa]] I could go through 5 declines and still be passionate to complete it. ==My coat of arms== [[File:Leonhart_Arms.svg|thumb]] [[Category:LGBT+ Wikipedians]] ==Gallery== File:I - sitelen sitelen sound symbol drawn by Jonathan Gabel.jpg|alt=|I File:Man - sitelen sitelen sound symbol drawn by Jonathan Gabel.jpg|alt=|Man File:Ju - sitelen sitelen sound symbol drawn by Jonathan Gabel.jpg|alt=|Yu File:E - sitelen sitelen sound symbol drawn by Jonathan Gabel.jpg|alt=|E File:La - sitelen sitelen sound symbol drawn by Jonathan Gabel.jpg|alt=|La File:Li - sitelen sitelen sound symbol drawn by Jonathan Gabel.jpg|alt=|Li File:On - sitelen sitelen sound symbol drawn by Jonathan Gabel.jpg|alt=|On File:Ha - sitelen sitelen sound symbol drawn by Jonathan Gabel.jpg|alt=|Ha File:Lu - sitelen sitelen sound symbol drawn by Jonathan Gabel.jpg|alt=|Lu File:To - sitelen sitelen sound symbol drawn by Jonathan Gabel.jpg|alt=|To File:Hi - sitelen sitelen sound symbol drawn by Jonathan Gabel.jpg|alt=|Hi File:Mi - sitelen sitelen sound symbol drawn by Jonathan Gabel.jpg|alt=|Mi File:Ko - sitelen sitelen sound symbol drawn by Jonathan Gabel.jpg|alt=|Ko

But my thought is basically I see them as having been a bit excessive, but I think the motive for introduction was reasonable. The fact that I can edit here means that they are definitely a lot less stressful than they would have been had I had no other outlets. Although at this point I feel The main way I felt they were unfair to me is that they were focusing on some of my worst articles from a long time before I got the hang of doing things. But at the same time I definitely did not have that good knowledge. I have studied Japanese since then because while I was kind of all over the place beforehand, I discovered my interest in Shinto while editing Wikipedia. The thing that really irritated me was getting stuck in AFC, draining myself on finding trivial references to try to get shrines through that I knew were notable from the jawiki articles, instead of focusing on more meaningful analytical content.
